(a) A motor carrier may not operate a commercial motor vehicle, as defined by Section 548.001 (Definitions) , on a road or highway of this state unless the carrier registers with the department under this subchapter.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 643. Motor Carrier Registration
##### § 643.051 — Registration Required

(a) A motor carrier may not operate a commercial motor vehicle, as defined by Section 548.001 (Definitions) , on a road or highway of this state unless the carrier registers with the department under this subchapter.

(b) A motor carrier may not operate a vehicle, regardless of size of the vehicle, to transport household goods for compensation unless the carrier registers with the department under this subchapter.

*Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1046 (H.B.2094), Sec. 3.07, eff. September 1, 2007.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A motor carrier may not operate a commercial motor vehicle, as defined by Section 548.001 (Definitions) , on a road or highway of this state unless the carrier registers with the department under this subchapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A motor carrier may not operate a vehicle, regardless of size of the vehicle, to transport household goods for compensation unless the carrier registers with the department under this subchapter.
